features: POWERFUL LIMESCALE REMOVAL: Eliminate up to 100% of limescale with these fast-acting descaler sachets. Whether it’s a kettle, coffee machine, steam iron, or shower head, these sachets dissolve stubborn deposits effortlessly for spotless results.

HELP KEEP APPLIANCES WORKING FOR LONGER: Hard water can damage household appliances over time. This multi purpose descaler helps prevent limescale build-up, keeping kettles, coffee machines, and irons working efficiently for longer.

EASY TO USE LIQUID SACHETS: No measuring, no mess! Each sachet contains a pre-measured dose of limescale remover, making descaling quick and effortless. Simply follow the instructions (stated on the packaging) for your chosen appliance, and let the Elbow Grease descaler solution do the hard work.

ESSENTIAL SHOWER CLEANER: Hard water leaves shower heads clogged and ineffective. These sachets easily dissolve limescale deposits, restoring water flow and ensuring a refreshing, powerful shower every time. A must-have for any bathroom cleaning routine.

QUICK AND EFFECTIVE RESULTS: No need to wait hours for results. The Elbow Grease fast-acting formula breaks down limescale in as little as 10 minutes, restoring your appliances with minimal effort. Perfect for busy households and on-the-go cleaning.

PROTECT AGAINST HARD WATER DAMAGE: Regular use helps prevent costly repairs and replacements. Ideal for those in hard water areas, this descaler keeps limescale at bay, reducing the risk of blockages and appliance breakdowns.

SAFE FOR HOUSEHOLDS & WORKPLACES: Gentle yet powerful, these descaler sachets are tough on limescale but safe for use in your home or work. Recommended -to treat appliances once every 3 months in hard water areas and once every 6 months in soft water areas.

VERSATILE CLEANING SOLUTION: Suitable for a range of household appliances, this descaler is also perfect for steam irons, kettles, coffee machines and shower heads. Keep your home free from limescale and looking as good as new.

MAXIMISE PERFORMANCE: Enjoy better-tasting drinks by removing limescale from your kettle and coffee machine. Descaling regularly ensures your appliances run smoothly, providing optimal performance with every use.

THE ONLY DESCALER YOU'LL EVER NEED: From kettles to coffee machines, steam irons to shower heads, this all-in-one solution is the ultimate addition to your cleaning products. Keep your appliances in top condition with one easy-to-use Elbow Grease product.
description: Product Description Tackle stubborn limescale effortlessly with these Elbow Grease all-purpose descaler sachets. Designed to remove up to 100% of limescale, they restore your appliances to peak performance. Each convenient liquid sachet delivers powerful descaling action, cutting through mineral build-up in kettles, coffee machines, steam irons, and shower heads. Easy to use and highly effective, this limescale remover is an essential addition to your cleaning products collection. Keep your home appliances running smoothly, and by treating regularly you'll say goodbye to limescale buildup for good! Ingredients Contains Lactic Acid Directions Kettle: * Fill the kettle halfway with water and allow to boil * Unplug the kettle and add 1 sachet * Leave to work for 10 minutes * Empty kettle and rinse thoroughly before use Coffee Machines: * Half fill the water reservoir * Add 1 sachet * Turn on the machine and allow to filter through. Rinse thoroughly before use Steam Irons: * Turn on the iron and WHEN HOT TURN OFF * Add 1 sachet to the water reservoir and top up with water * Set the iron to steam function and LEAVE THE IRON OFF * Allow the water in the reservoir to drain through the iron over a sink Shower Head: * Remove the shower head and place in a suitable container * Add 1 sachet and 1 litre of hot water * Allow to soak for 10 minutes * Replace the shower head and turn shower on full power to clear To keep your appliances working as they should, treat them once every 3 months in hard water areas and once every 6 months in soft water areas See more
